citation.sourceDocument: Utah State Tax Commission: 4.45% flat tax on Utah taxable income for tax year 2026 (SB 60, 2026 session, cutting the 2025 rate of 4.5%). Utah has no standard deduction — it taxes federal AGI directly and grants relief through the nonrefundable taxpayer tax credit (Utah Code §59-10-1018): 6% of the federal deduction, reduced by 1.3% of taxable income above a filing-status base ($18,213 single/MFS, $27,320 HoH, $36,426 MFJ/QSS), at the most recent published (2025) base amounts pending the 2026-indexed figures. The $2,111-per-dependent personal exemption that would enlarge the credit base is omitted (the engine models the no-dependent filer, like every other state), so the figure errs slightly high — the conservative side for setting money aside.
